description_long: This house features a two-story structure with a red gable roof and a prominent central entryway adorned with columns and a decorative crest above the door. The front yard is flanked by two large, festively decorated Christmas trees and several palm trees, creating a unique blend of holiday and tropical aesthetics. The facade includes large windows and a symmetrical arrangement, while the side and rear views reveal a flat, unadorned wall and a modern, irregularly shaped swimming pool. The roof is partially flat with a central gable section, and the exterior walls are finished in a light, neutral color. The property is surrounded by a paved walkway leading to the entrance, and the landscaping is minimal except for the festive elements. The overall design combines traditional and modern influences, with a focus on symmetry and decorative entry features.
description: A two-story house with a red gable roof, symmetrical facade, large windows, and a festive front yard featuring Christmas trees and palm trees. Includes a modern swimming pool and a prominent columned entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry with columns, decorative crest, two large Christmas trees, and palm trees flanking the walkway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat side wall, partial view of the red gable roof, palm trees, and the irregularly shaped swimming pool.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, flat wall, the tops of the Christmas trees, palm trees, and a clear view of the swimming pool.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the flat wall, large windows, palm trees, and the walkway leading to the entry, with the Christmas trees visible in the background.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with double doors, flanked by columns, decorative crest above, and a paved walkway with steps leading up
